content: 循环次数达到上限后用已有信息总结；成功失败都要总结；任务迭代与验收迭代计数分开；验收不超过10次

Implemented: BuildSessionSummary (success/partial/failed); emitLoopExhaustedSummary on max turns (ReAct generate-style); separate LoopPhaseImplement vs LoopPhaseAcceptance with acceptanceMaxTurns per cycle and maxAcceptanceCycles=10; removed recovery extraTurns inflation; signalTaskFailed emits LLM/heuristic summary + PartialCompleteMsg with acceptance panel; TUI failure shows ⚠ Task incomplete panel. Config: max_acceptance_recovery_cycles, acceptance_max_turns. go test ./... pass.
这一行信息不要 commands，因为 /help 就能看到所有
Removed Commands hint line from TUI header (header.go); /help covers slash commands.
要求，输入框之上的所有内容都能滚动

Unified scroll viewport: transcript + working indicator + completion/to-dos/acceptance panel scroll together above fixed input/footer. Removed pinned To-dos panel; TurnList.ViewScroll(prefix,suffix); scroll.go scrollExtras; contentViewportHeight now reserves only input+footer. Scroll keys/wheel use full viewport. Tests updated. go build/test pass.
我仅仅输入了一个 /help 就是这样，没有直接执行命令，跑去和大模型交互了，这个是严重的问题；

Fixed builtin command bypass: internal/commands.Parse/IsBuiltin; TUI applyBuiltinCommand before dialogs + abortAgentWork; RunLoop tryBuiltinCommand before session.Add; headless /help local; case-insensitive /Help, bare help/h. Tests added.
50 / 80 / 不限制  支持这样配置，默认50次

Sub-agent turn limits: default sub_agent_max_turns=50; config 50/80 or -1/0 unlimited via NormalizeTurnLimit; env OMNIDEV_SUB_AGENT_MAX_TURNS accepts 0/-1; TUI /status shows FormatTurnLimit; activity label 3/50 or 3/∞; scaleSubAgentLimits unlimited when base<=0. go test ./... pass.
ctrl + c 用来中断会话， quit 或者 exit  用来退出agent

Ctrl+C/Esc interrupt session (SaveInterruptCheckpoint, MarkInterrupted, PrepareRunInstruction merge follow-up, auto-resume dispatch); quit/exit only path to tea.Quit; footer/help updated; headless SIGINT still exits. go test ./... pass.
todos 点下左键会展开，但是松开左键后，又折叠起来了，不符合预期
Fixed To-dos double-toggle on Windows: bubbletea maps both press and release to Type=MouseLeft; toggle only on MouseActionPress via mouseTogglePress(). Tests added.
验收折叠同样问题+改英文+界面可复制+分析日志路径报错

English acceptance toggle (Acceptance passed/failed · view details); runlog moved to %LOCALAPPDATA%/omnidev-agent/logs; /copy + no alt-screen default for terminal select; recordToggleLines visual offset fix; acceptance_recovery English. go test ./... pass.
为什么会缺少子任务，恢复过来的时候，原来所有子任务也应该展示出来（完成和没有完成的），继续原来没有完成的任务继续完成任务

Root cause: acceptance-only checkpoint overwrote tasks; resume UI reset all to pending. Fix: rememberCheckpoint/mergeCheckpointTasks, persistAcceptanceCheckpoint no empty tasks, dispatchWithCheckpoint emits TaskPlanMsg+emitCheckpointTaskStates, merge on load. Tests checkpoint_snap_test.go. go test ./internal/agent/... pass.
按照这个实现（混合策略：继续/轻量重规划/全量重规划）
Implemented ClassifyFollowUpIntent...
输入 quit 和 exit 都没有退出 agent
Fix quit/exit...
会话中 Ctrl+C 中断，非会话中 Ctrl+C 退出；底部提示
isInSession+handleCtrlC...
To-dos/Acceptance 展开折叠多次后失效
Root cause: multi-line panel...
去掉展开折叠；任务完成后统一展示子任务+验收+总结（成功/失败）

Removed collapse/toggle UI (mouse t/a keys, toggle lines). CompletionPanel always shows: header, Completed sub-tasks box, Acceptance results, Failure reason (if failed), Summary (Changes/Next steps or Failure/Recommended solution), Project location. BuildSessionSummary prompts + structured fallbacks. NewAllCompleteWithAcceptance passes LLM conclusion. go test pass.
